title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 29.130 - Free access to other offices
text:
29.130.  Free access to other offices. — The state auditor shall have free access to all offices of this state for the inspection of such books, accounts and papers as concern any of his duties.
(RSMo 1939 § 13057, A.L. 1945 p. 584 § 9) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11433; 1919 § 13339; 1909 § 11840
